description: Composition Beige shorts that have an elasticated waist, two side pockets, two flaps at the back indicating a pocket with embroidery, two patch pockets on the sides with flaps, a drawstring on the waist and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
